defs: The rank, quality, state, or attributes of a king; royal authority; sovereign power; rule; dominion; monarchy.
quotes: Thy kingdom is an everlasting kingdom.
When Jehoram was risen up to the kingdom of his father, he strengthened himself.

defs: The territory or country subject to a king or queen; the dominion of a monarch; the sphere in which one is king or has control.
quotes: Unto the kingdom of perpetual night.
You're welcome, Most learned reverend sir, into our kingdom.

defs: An extensive scientific division distinguished by leading or ruling characteristics; a principal division; a department; as, the mineral kingdom. In modern biology, the division of life into five kingdoms is widely used for classification.
